event.description:
The May Hadoop meetup will be held Wednesday, May 9, from 6:00pm to 8:00pm. This meetup will be hosted by Eventbrite at 651 Brannan Street.

As usual, we will use the discussion-based "unconference" format. At the beginning of the meetup we will collaboratively construct an agenda consisting of several discussion breakout groups. All participants may propose a topic and volunteer to facilitate a discussion. All Hadoop-related topics are encouraged, and all members of the Hadoop community are welcome.

Event schedule:

6:00pm - Welcome 6:30pm - Introductions; start creating agenda Breakout sessions begin as soon as we're ready 8:00pm - Conclusion Food and refreshments will be provided courtesy of Eventbrite.
event.title: May 2012 San Francisco Hadoop User Meetup
